# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] UI
- [ ] Detection module
- [ ] Core architecture
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Other

## Defensive Purpose

Explain how this supports authorized testing, defensive analysis, secure development, or education.

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] This change does not add offensive payloads.
- [ ] This change does not support unauthorized testing.
- [ ] This change does not collect credentials or user-entered secrets.
- [ ] This change does not submit forms.
- [ ] This change does not perform brute force behavior.
- [ ] This change does not add hidden network requests.

## Testing

Describe how you tested the change.

## Documentation

- [ ] README or docs updated, if needed.
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated, if needed.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for popup or UI changes when helpful.
